headline: Rigel Pharmaceuticals (RIGL) Is Up 20.5% After Global VEPPANU Rights Deal With Pfizer, Arvinas - Has The Bull Case Changed?
summary: Rigel Pharmaceuticals has entered an exclusive global license agreement with Arvinas and Pfizer to develop, manufacture and commercialize VEPPANU (vepdegestrant), the first FDA-approved oral PROTAC for adults with ER+/HER2-, ESR1-mutated advanced or metastatic breast cancer, which was approved in May 2026 following positive Phase 3 VERITAC-2 data. A key nuance is that Rigel assumes worldwide commercialization rights, including the option to sublicense outside the U.S., while Arvinas and...
